page: Microsoft Azure FX32mds_v2 is an x86_64 architecture server belonging to the FXmdsv2 family, virtualized via Microsoft Hyper-V. It features 32 dedicated vCPUs derived from 16 physical cores of an Intel Xeon 8573C processor operating at 4.2 GHz. The processor includes a 260 MB L3 cache and supports Advanced Vector Extensions (AVX-512) and Advanced Matrix Extensions (AMX). Memory capacity is 672.0 GB, yielding 21.0 GB per physical core. Local storage consists of 1890 GB of premium storage-capable disk space, and there are no integrated GPUs.

Benchmark data indicates top-tier single-core performance, with a Geekbench single-core score of 2313.0 and strong text processing capabilities. Memory subsystem performance is strong, with large-block read bandwidth at 232.79 GB/sec and write bandwidth at 136.78 GB/sec. Multi-threaded decompression is also strong, reaching 200.05 GB/sec in bzip3 tests. However, database operations and Redis SET operations perform in the average tier, with Redis achieving 49.95 million operations per second.

While the server demonstrates strong performance in small to medium LLM prompt processing, it exhibits weak performance for large-scale LLM text generation, dropping to 2.72 tokens/sec on a 70B model due to the lack of hardware GPU acceleration. Given the high memory-to-vCPU ratio and local storage capacity, this server is configured for memory-intensive workloads, large-scale caching, in-memory databases, and data processing tasks that do not require GPU acceleration.
description: The Microsoft Azure FX32mds_v2 is a memory-optimized server from the FXmdsv2 family, powered by a 32-vCPU Intel Xeon 8573C processor running at 4.2 GHz. It features 672.0 GB of RAM, providing 21.0 GB per physical core, alongside 1890 GB of local storage. Operating on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor, this x86_64 virtual machine delivers top-tier single-core CPU performance and strong memory bandwidth, with large-block read speeds reaching 232.79 GB/sec. While it excels in memory-intensive tasks and single-threaded operations, its database operations and Redis SET performance remain average, and it exhibits weak text generation speeds for large language models due to the absence of a GPU. This configuration is suited for memory-intensive workloads, in-memory databases, and data processing applications.
og_description: Microsoft Azure FX32mds_v2 is a memory-optimized server with 32 vCPUs, 672 GB RAM, and 1890 GB local storage, delivering top-tier single-core performance and strong memory bandwidth.
meta_description: Microsoft Azure FX32mds_v2 is a memory-optimized server featuring 32 vCPUs, 672 GB RAM, and 1890 GB local storage for memory-intensive workloads.
tagline: A high-memory x86_64 virtual machine featuring 672 GB RAM, dedicated Intel Xeon processing, and local storage for memory-intensive workloads.
bullet_points: 32 dedicated vCPUs powered by an Intel Xeon 8573C processor at 4.2 GHz
672.0 GB of system memory providing 21.0 GB per physical core
1890 GB of local storage with Premium Storage capability
Top-tier single-core CPU performance and strong large-block memory bandwidth
Suited for memory-intensive workloads, in-memory databases, and data processing
